## Meeting purpose

[Discuss content strategy and opportunities to improve ROI for Homebase's content marketing efforts, with a focus on payroll-related content.](https://fathom.video/share/9FTevC2jwfsJN5hJF22wMfW1HRBXK9ao?tab=summary&timestamp=5.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Opportunity to significantly scale content output and reduce costs by leveraging AI-generated content](https://fathom.video/share/9FTevC2jwfsJN5hJF22wMfW1HRBXK9ao?tab=summary&timestamp=25.0)
  - [Payroll is a major focus area with high search volume and business impact potential](https://fathom.video/share/9FTevC2jwfsJN5hJF22wMfW1HRBXK9ao?tab=summary&timestamp=48.0)
  - [Need to improve website/CMS infrastructure to enable more advanced content experiences](https://fathom.video/share/9FTevC2jwfsJN5hJF22wMfW1HRBXK9ao?tab=summary&timestamp=708.0)
  - [Potential to launch a newsletter/email acquisition strategy to drive more leads from content](https://fathom.video/share/9FTevC2jwfsJN5hJF22wMfW1HRBXK9ao?tab=summary&timestamp=2460.0)

## Topics

### AI-Generated Content and Cost Savings

  - [Reviewed sample AI-generated content which showed promising quality](https://fathom.video/share/9FTevC2jwfsJN5hJF22wMfW1HRBXK9ao?tab=summary&timestamp=1712.0)
  - [Potential to double content output while reducing costs by 50% or more](https://fathom.video/share/9FTevC2jwfsJN5hJF22wMfW1HRBXK9ao?tab=summary&timestamp=552.0)
  - [Would free up budget for more premium content types like video, interactive tools, etc.](https://fathom.video/share/9FTevC2jwfsJN5hJF22wMfW1HRBXK9ao?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)

### Payroll as a Strategic Focus

  - [Payroll has 4x larger total addressable market compared to scheduling/timeclock products](https://fathom.video/share/9FTevC2jwfsJN5hJF22wMfW1HRBXK9ao?tab=summary&timestamp=1565.0)
  - [Gusto and ADP are major competitors with sophisticated content/SEO strategies](https://fathom.video/share/9FTevC2jwfsJN5hJF22wMfW1HRBXK9ao?tab=summary&timestamp=1441.0)
  - [Opportunities around forms, compliance content, calculators, and state/county-specific topics](https://fathom.video/share/9FTevC2jwfsJN5hJF22wMfW1HRBXK9ao?tab=summary&timestamp=2070.0)
  - [Need deeper understanding of jobs-to-be-done and user needs in payroll space](https://fathom.video/share/9FTevC2jwfsJN5hJF22wMfW1HRBXK9ao?tab=summary&timestamp=1158.0)

### Website/CMS Limitations

  - [Current WordPress setup is limiting ability to create advanced content experiences](https://fathom.video/share/9FTevC2jwfsJN5hJF22wMfW1HRBXK9ao?tab=summary&timestamp=708.0)
  - [Proposed pausing additional WordPress investment to pursue CMS migration to Webflow](https://fathom.video/share/9FTevC2jwfsJN5hJF22wMfW1HRBXK9ao?tab=summary&timestamp=1620.0)
  - [With better CMS, can create dedicated content hubs, tools, and differentiated experiences](https://fathom.video/share/9FTevC2jwfsJN5hJF22wMfW1HRBXK9ao?tab=summary&timestamp=1727.0)

### Email Acquisition Strategy

  - [Blog has very low 0.3% conversion rate currently with no systematic lead capture](https://fathom.video/share/9FTevC2jwfsJN5hJF22wMfW1HRBXK9ao?tab=summary&timestamp=5930.0)
  - [Opportunity to launch a newsletter with relevant content to start building an email database](https://fathom.video/share/9FTevC2jwfsJN5hJF22wMfW1HRBXK9ao?tab=summary&timestamp=6061.0)
  - [Potential to leverage services like Beehive to rapidly grow newsletter subscribers](https://fathom.video/share/9FTevC2jwfsJN5hJF22wMfW1HRBXK9ao?tab=summary&timestamp=6700.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Marcel to dig deeper into payroll keyword research and existing content coverage](https://fathom.video/share/9FTevC2jwfsJN5hJF22wMfW1HRBXK9ao?tab=summary&timestamp=4449.0)
  - [Explore state/county-specific payroll topics and content opportunities](https://fathom.video/share/9FTevC2jwfsJN5hJF22wMfW1HRBXK9ao?tab=summary&timestamp=2208.0)
  - [Discuss timeline and requirements for pursuing CMS migration](https://fathom.video/share/9FTevC2jwfsJN5hJF22wMfW1HRBXK9ao?tab=summary&timestamp=1620.0)
  - [Evaluate newsletter strategy and potential tools/services to implement](https://fathom.video/share/9FTevC2jwfsJN5hJF22wMfW1HRBXK9ao?tab=summary&timestamp=6061.0)
  - [Set weekly recurring meeting to continue strategy discussions](https://fathom.video/share/9FTevC2jwfsJN5hJF22wMfW1HRBXK9ao?tab=summary&timestamp=1405.0)
